tofugu.description: Japanese language and culture lessons with progressive difficulty
tofugu.progress_tracking: No built-in order — articles are independent topics organized by category (Japanese, Grammar, Resources, Japan, Series, etc.). Select intelligently based on dependencies inferred from content.
tofugu.ordering_strategy: Infer from content. Some series have internal ordering — respect that if detected.

used_articles.title: Learn Japanese: A Ridiculously Detailed Guide

tofugu.structure_notes: Navigate via categories/archives. Topics can be standalone or have implicit prerequisites. Some series have sequences (e.g., 'What's The Difference?' series).

yoku_bi.description: Comprehensive sequential Japanese grammar lessons from absolute beginner to advanced
yoku_bi.progress_tracking: Strict sequential order — numbered lessons (Lesson 0, 1, 2, etc.). Must respect progression. Organized into sections: Section 1 (Absolute Beginner Parts 1-4), Section 2 (Absolute Territory), etc.
yoku_bi.ordering_strategy: Follow lesson sequence strictly. Track next_lesson_index to maintain position.

used_articles.title: Lesson 0: The Anatomy of Japanese Sentences

yoku_bi.structure_notes: Lessons are numbered and hierarchically organized. Each lesson builds on previous ones. Follow the sequence for coherent learning.

tatsumoto.description: Comprehensive structured Japanese learning guide with explicit prerequisite hierarchy
tatsumoto.progress_tracking: Hierarchical order — follow the table of contents. Respect stated prerequisites.
tatsumoto.ordering_strategy: Follow TOC hierarchy and prerequisite chains strictly. Never serve an article before its stated prerequisites are satisfied.
tatsumoto.structure_notes: Has explicit prerequisite chains in TOC. Always check dependencies before serving an article. This is the most structured source with clear learning paths.

ixrec.description: Comprehensive nested articles on Japanese topics with numbered sections (e.g., 69 particles in /all-about-particles)
ixrec.progress_tracking: Mega-pages with numbered subsections — extract individual sections, not full pages. Example: /all-about-particles contains 69 numbered particles (1. Wa は, 2. Ga が, etc.) plus sentence-ending particles.
ixrec.ordering_strategy: Select at subsection level (individual particle, grammar point, etc.), not full page. Within each mega-page, follow numerical order or select intelligently based on dependencies.

used_articles.title: Introduction: Guide Philosophy, Study Methodology & The Three Alphabets

ixrec.structure_notes: Mega-pages like /all-about-particles are collections of numbered entries. Extract and track individual sections. Example: track /all-about-particles#1-wa separately from /all-about-particles#2-ga.

imabi.description: Sequential numbered Japanese grammar lessons in progressive order
imabi.progress_tracking: Natural sequential order — articles are numbered. Can follow order or select based on topics.
imabi.ordering_strategy: Follow sequential numbering. Track next_article_index to maintain position and suggest coherent progression.
imabi.structure_notes: Numbered articles with implicit sequential ordering. Follow sequence for coherent learning path, or allow intelligent jumps based on content analysis.
